title: FDIC Failure Forensics
summary: Retrospective failure-forensics workflow for a single FDIC-insured institution. Reconstructs the pre-failure financial timeline from public FDIC data, identifies the earliest visible warning signals, and explains likely drivers of deterioration.

required.name: institution_identity
required.description: Failed bank name or FDIC CERT number

optional.name: lookback_window
optional.description: Number of quarters before the pre-failure report date

optional.name: focus_area
optional.description: Optional domain focus: funding, credit, earnings, or overall

outputs.primary: Failure forensics report with financial timeline, warning signals, and likely failure drivers

steps.name: Institution Resolution and Failure Confirmation
steps.description: Resolve CERT, confirm failure record, derive date parameters

steps.name: Data Collection
steps.description: Build financial timeline, detect risk signals, collect health assessment and structural history

steps.name: Domain Follow-Up
steps.description: Conditional funding/credit analysis based on signals

steps.name: Report Assembly
steps.description: Produce 8-section forensics report with observed/inferred/unknown labeling

stop_conditions: Institution not found in FDIC data
No failure record exists for the identified CERT
No financial data in the lookback window
